debug_info.goal:
C : Type
inst✝¹ : Category.{0, 0} C
K : Type
inst✝ : DivisionRing K
M : CategoryTheory.Functor C (ModuleCat K)
D : @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M
hmax : IsMin D
x y : PersistenceSubmodule M
hxy : Disjoint x y
hN : x ⊔ y ∈ D
hx : ¬x = ⊥
hy : ¬y = ⊥
B : (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) → N ∈ D → Set (PersistenceSubmodule M) := ⋯
⊢ ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), sSupIndep (B N hN)

proof: (fun N hN => by dsimp [B]; split_ifs; exact sSupIndep_pair (by rintro rfl; exact hx (disjoint_self.1 hxy)) |>.mpr hxy; exact sSupIndep_singleton N)
failed_attempts: (fun N hN => by simp [B]; split_ifs; exacts [(sSupIndep_pair (fun h => hx (hxy.eq_bot h))).mpr hxy, sSupIndep_singleton])
(fun N hN => by simp [B]; split_ifs; · exact (sSupIndep_pair (by rintro rfl; exact hx (disjoint_self.mp hxy))).mpr hxy; · exact sSupIndep_singleton)

(fun N hN ↦ by
      dsimp [B]
      split_ifs
      · exact (sSupIndep_pair (hxy.ne hx)).mpr hxy
      · exact sSupIndep_singleton)
(fun N hN => by split_ifs with h; · exact (sSupIndep_pair (by rintro rfl; exact hx (disjoint_self.mp hxy))).mpr hxy; · exact sSupIndep_singleton)
(fun N hN ↦ by dsimp [B]; split_ifs; exact (sSupIndep_pair (fun e ↦ hx (e ▸ disjoint_self.mp hxy))).mpr hxy; exact sSupIndep_singleton)

(fun N hN => by
      simp [B]
      split_ifs
      · exact (sSupIndep_pair (by rintro rfl; exact hx (disjoint_self.1 hxy))).mpr hxy
      · exact sSupIndep_singleton)

(fun N hN => by
      simp [B]
      split_ifs
      · exact (sSupIndep_pair (fun h => hx (h ▸ disjoint_self.mp hxy))).mpr hxy
      · exact sSupIndep_singleton)
(fun N hN ↦ by dsimp [B]; split_ifs; · exact (sSupIndep_pair (by rintro rfl; simpa using hxy)).mpr hxy; · exact sSupIndep_singleton)
(fun N hN ↦ by dsimp [B]; split_ifs; exact (sSupIndep_pair (by rintro rfl; exact hx (disjoint_self.mp hxy))).mpr hxy; exact sSupIndep_singleton)
(fun N hN => by dsimp [B]; split_ifs; · exact (sSupIndep_pair (fun h => hx (h.symm ▸ hxy).eq_bot)).mpr hxy; · exact sSupIndep_singleton)
(fun N hN ↦ by simp [B]; split_ifs; · exact sSupIndep_pair (hxy.ne_self_of_ne_bot hx) |>.mpr hxy; · exact sSupIndep_singleton)
(fun N hN ↦ by dsimp [B]; split_ifs; exact (sSupIndep_pair (by rintro rfl; exact hx (disjoint_self.mp hxy))).mpr hxy; exact sSupIndep_singleton)
(fun N _ ↦ by split_ifs; exacts [(sSupIndep_pair fun e ↦ hx (e ▸ hxy).self_eq_bot).mpr hxy, sSupIndep_singleton])
(fun N hN ↦ by dsimp [B]; split_ifs; exact (sSupIndep_pair (fun e ↦ hy (disjoint_self.mp (e ▸ hxy)))).mpr hxy; exact sSupIndep_singleton)
(fun N hN => by dsimp [B]; split_ifs; exacts [(sSupIndep_pair (by rintro rfl; exact hx (disjoint_self.mp hxy))).mpr hxy, sSupIndep_singleton])
(fun N hN => by dsimp [B]; split_ifs; exacts [sSupIndep_pair (by rintro rfl; exact hx (hxy.eq_bot_of_le le_rfl)).mpr hxy, sSupIndep_singleton])
(fun N hN ↦ by dsimp [B]; split_ifs; exacts [(sSupIndep_pair (by rintro rfl; aesop)).mpr hxy, sSupIndep_singleton])
(fun N hN ↦ by split_ifs; · exact (sSupIndep_pair (by rintro rfl; exact hx (hxy.eq_bot le_rfl))).mpr hxy; · exact sSupIndep_singleton)
(fun N hN ↦ by dsimp [B]; split_ifs; exacts [(sSupIndep_pair (fun h ↦ hx (h ▸ hxy.eq_bot))).mpr hxy, sSupIndep_singleton])
(fun N hN => by split_ifs with h; exacts [(sSupIndep_pair (fun h_eq => hx (h_eq ▸ disjoint_self.mp hxy))).mpr hxy, sSupIndep_singleton])

(fun N hN ↦ by
      simp [B]
      split_ifs
      · exact (sSupIndep_pair (by rintro rfl; exact hx (hxy.eq_bot le_rfl))).mpr hxy
      · exact sSupIndep_singleton)
(fun N hN ↦ by dsimp [B]; split_ifs; · exact (sSupIndep_pair (by rintro rfl; exact hx (disjoint_self.1 hxy))).mpr hxy; · exact sSupIndep_singleton)

(fun N hN ↦ by
      simp only [B]
      split_ifs
      · exact (sSupIndep_pair fun e ↦ hy (disjoint_self.mp (e ▸ hxy))).mpr hxy
      · exact sSupIndep_singleton)

(fun N hN ↦ by
      simp [B]
      split_ifs
      · exact (sSupIndep_pair (hxy.ne hx hy)).mpr hxy
      · exact sSupIndep_singleton)
(fun N hN ↦ by simp only [B]; split_ifs; exacts [(sSupIndep_pair (by rintro rfl; exact hx (disjoint_self.mp hxy))).mpr hxy, sSupIndep_singleton])

(fun N hN => by
      dsimp [B]
      split_ifs
      · exact (sSupIndep_pair (by intro h; subst h; exact hx (disjoint_self.mp hxy))).mpr hxy
      · exact sSupIndep_singleton)

(fun N hN ↦ by
      simp only [B]; split_ifs
      · exact (sSupIndep_pair (fun h ↦ hx (h ▸ disjoint_self.mp hxy))).mpr hxy
      · exact sSupIndep_singleton)

(fun N hN ↦ by
      simp only [B]
      split_ifs
      · exact (sSupIndep_pair (fun h ↦ hx (h ▸ hxy).eq_bot)).mpr hxy
      · exact sSupIndep_singleton)
(fun N hN => by dsimp [B]; split_ifs; exacts [(sSupIndep_pair (fun h => hx (disjoint_self.mp (h ▸ hxy)))).mpr hxy, sSupIndep_singleton])
(fun N hN => by split_ifs; exacts [(sSupIndep_pair (by rintro rfl; exact hx (disjoint_self.mp hxy))).mpr hxy, sSupIndep_singleton N])
successful_attempts: (fun N hN => by dsimp [B]; split_ifs; exact sSupIndep_pair (by rintro rfl; exact hx (disjoint_self.1 hxy)) |>.mpr hxy; exact sSupIndep_singleton N)
(fun N hN ↦ by dsimp [B]; split_ifs; exacts [(sSupIndep_pair (hxy.ne hx)).mpr hxy, sSupIndep_singleton N])
